chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I take notes at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は職場でどうやってメモを取るかについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually take notes on my laptop because typing is fast for me.
chunks.ja: 私はたいていノートパソコンでメモを取ります。タイピングが速いからです。

chunks.en: I write things down during meetings and when I'm on a phone call.
chunks.ja: 会議中や電話中に、私は物事を書き留めます。

chunks.en: What I usually write is my tasks, deadlines, and some important numbers.
chunks.ja: 私がよく書くのは、やることや締め切り、そしていくつかの大事な数字です。

chunks.en: To find my notes later, I use a search box and simple keywords.
chunks.ja: あとでメモを見つけるために、私は検索ボックスと簡単なキーワードを使います。

chunks.en: So that's how I keep my notes clear and easy to find.
chunks.ja: というわけで、これが私のメモを分かりやすく探しやすく保つ方法です。

outline: Opening: how I take notes at work
Tools and moments: laptop, meetings and calls
What I write: tasks, deadlines, numbers
Wrap-up: searching keywords to find notes

modelTalk.text: I take notes almost every day at work. I use my laptop most of the time. But I also keep a small paper notebook on my desk. Sometimes I use my phone for quick things. When I'm in a meeting, I write down the main points. When I'm on a call, I take notes too, so I don't forget. I usually write my plans and the things I need to do. I write down numbers, dates, and names as well. Later, I need to find my notes again. On my laptop, I use the search box to find them fast. In my notebook, I put the date at the top of each page. That helps me a lot. So my notes are simple, but they really work for me. That's how I stay organized at work.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I take notes at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は、仕事でどうやってメモを取るかについて話したいと思います。

chunks.en: The tool I use most is a note app on my laptop.
chunks.ja: 私が一番よく使う道具は、パソコンのメモアプリです。

chunks.en: I usually write things down during meetings and quick phone calls.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい、会議中や短い電話の間にメモを取ります。

chunks.en: What I usually write is my to-do list, deadlines, and server numbers.
chunks.ja: 私がよく書き留めるのは、やることリストや締め切り、そしてサーバーの数字です。

chunks.en: To find my notes later, I search by keywords and use simple tags.
chunks.ja: あとでメモを見つけるために、キーワードで検索し、シンプルなタグを使います。

outline: Opening: how I take notes at work
Point 1: my main tool and when I write
Point 2: what I write and how I organize it
Wrap-up: finding notes later by search

modelTalk.text:
I take notes in a few ways at work. Mostly I use my phone. It's always with me, so it's quick. But for long meetings, I use my laptop. Sometimes I still grab a paper notebook. It just feels easier for me.

I write things down all the time. In meetings, I note the main points. During phone calls, I write names and dates fast. When my boss asks for something, I write that too.

I usually write my plans, my to-do list, and numbers. Deadlines, prices, small tasks — I don't want to forget them.

Later, I need to find my notes again. On my phone, I use folders and I search for keywords. In my notebook, I add dates on top. So I can flip back and find things. It's simple, but it works for me every day.
